query:
SELECT DISTINCT p.name, p.tags 
FROM professors p
JOIN research_field_tag_mapping m ON JSON_CONTAINS(LOWER(p.tags), JSON_QUOTE(m.tag))
WHERE m.research_field_name IN ('AI/Machine Learning', 'Cybersecurity', 'Data Science', 'Human-Computer Interaction', 'Software Engineering')
AND p.university_name = 'University of Washington'
LIMIT 5;
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2w6DdBww2bzwyZZ.root --database hB2F5YxeXakQRcL5WU36Vw --execute 
SELECT DISTINCT p.name, p.tags 
FROM professors p
JOIN research_field_tag_mapping m ON JSON_CONTAINS(LOWER(p.tags), JSON_QUOTE(m.tag))
WHERE m.research_field_name IN ('AI/Machine Learning', 'Cybersecurity', 'Data Science', 'Human-Computer Interaction', 'Software Engineering')
AND p.university_name = 'University of Washington'
LIMIT 5;
